# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: Cross-account IAM role for CI/CD with wildcard Org trust
Parameters:
  RoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: cicd-cross-account-role
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organizations ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx)
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Optional ExternalId required to assume the role (leave blank to disable)
  MaxSessionDuration:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3600
    MinValue: 900
    MaxValue: 43200
  PermissionsPolicyArns:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: ""
    Description: Optional list of managed policy ARNs to attach
Conditions:
  HasExternalId: !Not [!Equals [!Ref ExternalId, ""]]
  HasManagedPolicies: !Not [!Equals [!Join ["", !Ref PermissionsPolicyArns], ""]]
Resources:
  CICDCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref MaxSessionDuration
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAssumeFromAnyAccountInOrg
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
              StringLike:
                aws:PrincipalArn:
                  - "arn:aws:iam::*:role/*"
              Fn::If:
                - HasExternalId
                - { StringEquals: { "sts:ExternalId": !Ref ExternalId } }
                - { "aws:PrincipalOrgID": !Ref "AWS::NoValue" }
      ManagedPolicyArns: !If
        - HasManagedPolicies
        - !Ref PermissionsPolicyArns
        - !Ref "AWS::NoValue"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AllowBasicCICDAssumeAndRead
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Sid: AllowIdentityDiscovery
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:GetCallerIdentity
                Resource: "*"
Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt CICDCrossAccountRole.Arn
  RoleName:
    Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
